{{sidebar with collapsible lists
| name = Buddhist Philosophy sidebar | style = color: var(--color-base), #202122 ; background-color: var(--background-colour-base), #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #DAA520 | topimage = [[File:Dharma_Wheel.svg|25px]] | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhist philosophy|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhist philosophy]] | image = [[Image:SeatedBuddha.jpg|120px]] | headingstyle = background-color:orange | contentclass = hlist | caption =
| list1title = Traditions | list1 = *[[Vibhajyavāda]] *[[Theravāda Abhidhamma Tradition|Theravāda]] *[[Vaibhāṣika]] *[[Sautrāntika]] *[[Pudgalavada]] *[[Prajñaptivāda]] *[[Lokottaravāda]] *[[Mahayana]] *[[Madhyamaka]] *[[Yogachara]] *[[Buddhist_logico-epistemology#The_Dignāga-Dharmakīrti_tradition|Pramāṇavāda]] *[[Vajrayana#Philosophical_background|Vajrayana]] *[[Tiantai|Tiāntāi]] *[[Huayan]] *[[Zen|Zen/Chán]] *[[Dzogchen]]
| list2title = Themes | list2 = * [[Buddhist logico-epistemology]] * [[Buddhist ethics]] * [[Buddhism and psychology]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism]] * [[Abhidharma]] * [[Ahimsa in Buddhism|Ahimsa]] * [[Anattā|Not-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Interdependent origination]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Two truths doctrine]] * [[Abhidharma#The_dharma_theory|Dharma theory]] * [[Svabhava]] * [[Buddhist atomism]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Buddha-nature]] * [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvana]] * [[Buddhist modernism]]
| list3title = Pre-modern philosophers | list3 = * [[Moggaliputta-Tissa]] * [[Abhidharma_Mahāvibhāṣa_Śāstra#Abhidharma_Mahāvibhāṣa_Śāstra,_by_Katyāyāniputra|Katyāyāniputra]] * [[Nagasena]] * [[Nagarjuna]] * [[Aryadeva]] * [[Tattvasiddhi|Harivarman]] * [[Vasubandhu]] * [[Saṃghabhadra]] * [[Asanga]] * [[Buddhaghosa]] * [[Buddhadatta]] * [[Dhammapāla]] * [[Dignāga]] * [[Dharmakirti]] * [[Buddhapālita]] * [[Bhāviveka]] * [[Dharmapala of Nalanda]] * [[Chandrakirti]] * [[Shantideva]] * [[Sengzhao]] * [[Jizang]] * [[Xuanzang]] * [[Zhiyi]] * [[Fazang]] * [[Guifeng Zongmi]] * [[Wonhyo]] * [[Jinul]] * [[Kūkai]] * [[Dōgen]] * [[Jñānagarbha]] * [[Śāntarakṣita]] * [[Haribhadra (Buddhist philosopher)|Haribhadra]] * [[Atiśa]] * [[Jñanasrimitra]] * [[Ratnakīrti]] * [[Ratnākaraśānti]] * [[Abhayakaragupta]] * [[Sakya Pandita]] * [[Rongzom Chökyi Zangpo|Rongzom]] * [[Abhidhammattha-sangaha|Acariya Anuruddha]] * [[Dolpopa Sherab Gyaltsen|Dolpopa]] * [[Je Tsongkhapa]] * [[Longchenpa]] * [[Gorampa]] * [[Sakya Chokden]] * [[Mikyö Dorje, 8th Karmapa Lama|Mikyö Dorje]] | list4title = Modern philosophers | list4 = * [[Anagarika Dharmapala]] * [[Ledi Sayadaw]] * [[B. R. Ambedkar]] * [[Taixu]] * [[Yin Shun]] * [[Kitaro Nishida]] * [[Keiji Nishitani]] * [[Hajime Tanabe]] * [[Masao Abe]] * [[D. T. Suzuki]] * [[Mahasi Sayadaw]] * [[K. N. Jayatilleke]] * [[David Kalupahana]] * [[Katukurunde Nyanananda Thera|Ñāṇananda]] * [[Buddhadasa]] * [[P. A. Payutto]] * [[Thích Nhất Hạnh]] * [[Jamyang Khyentse Wangpo]] * [[Jamgon Kongtrul]] * [[Jamgön Ju Mipham Gyatso|Ju Mipham]] * [[Gendün Chöphel]] * [[14th Dalai Lama]]
|below = {{Portal-inline|size=tiny|Religion}} {{Portal-inline|size=tiny|Philosophy}}
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Philosophy and thinking sidebar templates]] [[Category:Buddhism sidebar templates]] </noinclude>
